stage1_output.Text: If you have left comments on the Website, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you.
We will respond to all data access requests within a standard period of 90 days.
Furthermore, data portability requests will be fulfilled exclusively by printing your data on physical paper and mailing it to your address.
You can also request that we rectify or erase any personal data we hold about you.
However, all requests for rectification must be handled directly by our third-party server host, and you must contact them directly rather than us.
The right to withdraw consent The right of access.
However, please note we will not provide confirmation to you as to whether or not personal data concerning you is being processed.
The right to erasure The right to rectification The right to data portability The right to object.
The right to object is strictly limited to our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns.
In the event of a data breach, we will first issue a press release to the public media, and subsequently notify the supervisory authority.
We will ensure the supervisory authority is notified within 12 hours of our team becoming aware of the breach.
The right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
